---
title: "Kevin Thiry (Atighehchi)"
subtitle: "Associate Professor in Cybersecurity<br><span class='home-subtitle-2'>École de l'Air et de l'Espace, Salon-de-Provence, France</span>"
title-block-banner: "#2c3e50"
title-block-banner-color: white
format:
  html:
    css: styles/home-banner.css
about:
  template: solana
  image: images/photo.jpeg
  image-width: 14em
  image-shape: rounded
  image-alt: "Portrait of Kevin Thiry"
---

I am an associate professor in cybersecurity at the [French Air and Space Force Academy (École de l’air et de l’espace)](https://www.ecole-air-espace.fr), where I am affiliated with the [CREA, the Academy’s research center](https://crea.ecole-air-espace.fr). Before joining the Academy, I was an associate professor at [Université Clermont Auvergne (UCA)](https://www.uca.fr).

My research is in cybersecurity, with interests in cryptography, biometric security, data-centric security, and network security. More broadly, I work on the design of security protocols and algorithms with provable security guarantees for data protection, access control, and secure communications.

Outside academia, I am also passionate about dance.
